contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: DApp notification badge v1 fully wired + agentic_ai_context doc
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/234
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/123
  
  Details:
  Closed out v1 of the DApp notification badge by wiring Module 2 (Partner Check-in follow-ups) to the existing GAS endpoint and capturing the full contract + anti-pattern guardrails in agentic_ai_context.
  
  ## Shipped today (cumulative across this session)
  - dapp PR #233: widget framework (js/notifications.js) + Outbound Review module wired against the existing getWarmupReviewQueue endpoint. 33 HTML pages cache-busted, menu.js async-injects the widget so future modules need zero per-page changes.
  - dapp PR #234: Partner Check-in follow-ups module wired against the live  GAS action on tdg_shipping_planner (which already shipped 2026-05-12 with the Partner Check-in surface — zero new GAS code needed). Partner names joined from partners-velocity.json with per-page-load caching. Operator-driven cadence: the badge surfaces partners whose operator-specified Next Check-in Date is overdue or within 3 days.
  - agentic_ai_context PR #123: DAPP_NOTIFICATION_BADGE.md (~225 lines) covering the source contract, both v1 modules with their data sources and cadence rules, future-module candidates with status, and the anti-pattern guardrail. NOTES_dapp.md cross-references the new doc.
  
  ## Anti-pattern explicitly guarded
  Per feedback_check_tracking_before_recommending_action.md, the badge does not recommend activity. Both v1 modules surface things the operator has already asked to be reminded about: warmup drafts the operator filed into the gate cohorts, and partner check-ins where the operator picked the Next Check-in Date themselves. The doc captures this design constraint as a 'rule of thumb' for future modules.
  
  ## v1 closed; v1.x candidates in the doc
  Currency-conversion records missing receipt, DAO proposals nearing 7-day vote close, inventory-shipment exceptions, tree-planting registrations awaiting verification, Beer Hall digest failure. None wired yet — doc explicitly says 'wire modules one at a time, the value comes from each one being trusted.'
  
  PRs:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/233 (widget framework + Outbound Review)
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/234 (Partner Check-in follow-ups wire)
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/123 (DAPP_NOTIFICATION_BADGE.md + cross-link)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
